name: private-buddy
description: Private Buddy - A private AI chat assistant

scripts.build:server:win: cd server && CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=windows GOARCH=amd64 go build -o private-buddy-server.exe ./cmd/server/
scripts.build:server:linux: cd server && CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux GOARCH=amd64 go build -o private-buddy-server ./cmd/server/
scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build:electron
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build:server && npm run build && electron-builder --mac --config.directories.output=dist-electron/mac
scripts.dist:win: npm run build:server:win && npm run build && electron-builder --win --config.directories.output=dist-electron/win
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build:server:linux && npm run build && electron-builder --linux --config.directories.output=dist-electron/linux
